text: Everything here feels suspended in a dreamlike stillness. The faint blue glow of the enclosed room, the emptiness of the chairs, and the sharp contrast of dark and light—these all amplify my awareness of space and silence. The R+D on the wall hints at creativity and experimentation, yet the subdued lighting makes it all feel distant and abstracted. I feel like I am in a liminal space, caught between the absence of people and the potentiality of ideas yet to emerge.
